items.titolo: Intel Xeon 7 ‘Diamond Rapids’ CPUs officially launching in 2027 on Intel 18A-P — next-gen P-core Xeon features PCIe 6.0, 50% higher core counts, and twice the memory bandwidth
items.descrizione: Intel has officially confirmed its next-gen Xeon 7 Diamond Rapids CPUs are coming in 2027, featuring 50% higher core counts and twice the memory bandwidth of Xeon 6 in a bid to compete against AMD’s upcoming EPYC Venice

items.titolo: Nvidia and Microsoft tease "a new era of PC" ahead of Computex 2026 — coordinated social media posts could indicate that rumored N1X laptops will be Windows on Arm systems
items.descrizione: An Nvidia-powered Arm PC running Windows could inspire new local AI experiences beyond Copilot+.

items.titolo: I've used Android Auto with Gemini for 2 months now - it's transformed my drives in 4 ways
items.descrizione: Gemini has made voice control in my car fun and useful, and I'm still discovering new ways to use it.
Pope Leo XIV may not be able to disarm AI, but he’s got the attention of the industry.
